scope: dm delete-for-all correctness after optimistic overlay close

moved_logic_domains.change: Delete-for-all checkbox state is now read from a live ref to prevent stale state and accidental local-only delete.
Load-more sentinel moved out of the badge row so loading badge stays centered in DM list/thread.

detected_risks: If users rely on function-form setter for delete-for-all state, tracked setter still supports it but coerces to boolean.
notes: Validation: pnpm eslint on touched files passed.
Validation: pnpm build passed (existing non-blocking no-img warnings remain).
